judgment.summary: Strong growth estimates and healthy margins are offset by a high trailing P/E and a significant forward P/E.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 4.1%; next earnings date is 2026-08-03.
positives: Analyst growth est, current FY 31.5% — strong projected top-line expansion.
Gross margin 42.7% and Operating margin 18.2% — indicate efficient operations.
Free cash flow (TTM) $1.28B — robust cash generation.
Consensus 'buy' rating from 29 analysts — broad institutional support.
negatives: Trailing P/E 81.04 — valuation appears stretched on historical earnings.
Forward P/E 25.93 — still a premium multiple, pricing in significant growth.
Return on equity 7.5% — could be higher given the business model.
Beta 1.94 — stock exhibits higher volatility than the broader market.

news.paragraph: ON Semiconductor was among the tech leaders favored by hedge funds last month, according to Hazeltree data. While this suggests positive institutional sentiment, the broader market context for tech remains a key factor for traders. The next earnings date is August 3rd, which could provide a catalyst for price movement.

headlines.title: Tech leaders favoured by hedge funds last month, Hazeltree says
